name: novel-architectures-brain-tumor
description: Novel CNN architectures for brain tumor classification and segmentation from MRI
paperTitle: Deep Learning for Brain Tumor Segmentation
content:
## Deep Learning for Brain Tumor Segmentation

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.06531 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.06531

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
